TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Cinbulan, title = Cinbulan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cinbulan} }

S.FORM: Cinbulan Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Cinbulan a niyaro', 109 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 324 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 91% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 295 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 9% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 29 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 85%, Amis 2%, Saysiyat 1%, roma 3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ʦinb~b~vo~u~uɾan itiniaj i *iansħi ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u ʦinb~b~vo~u~uɾan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis *%, sajsijat *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Cinbulan Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Cinbulan a niyaro', 109 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 324 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 91% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 295 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 9% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 29 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 85%, Amis 2%, Saysiyat 1%, roma 3%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: ʦinb~b~vo~u~uɾan itiniaj i *iansħi ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u ʦinb~b~vo~u~uɾan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ **%, amis *%, sajsijat *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
